answer: NayePankh Foundation is a student-led NGO working towards education, youth empowerment, skill development, social awareness, and community impact initiatives across India.
You can volunteer by participating in educational programs, awareness campaigns, fundraising initiatives, event management activities, and content creation.
NayePankh conducts educational initiatives, hygiene awareness campaigns, food distribution drives, clothing drives, and youth empowerment programs.
Volunteering at NayePankh can help you develop leadership, communication, teamwork, event management, and problem-solving skills.

keywords: who is the founder of nayepankh foundation
answer: NayePankh Foundation was founded by Prashant Shukla.
